title: CBB Rulebook Volume 2 OM-2A Cloud Outsourcing Arrangements
summary: Applies cloud outsourcing governance, security, data protection, confidentiality, audit, regulatory access and resilience requirements to Islamic bank licensees using cloud service providers.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Cloud outsourcing controls for Islamic bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
